title: Collectible Travel Card Miniature City Diorama AI
sourceTitle: Collectible Travel Card Miniature City Diorama AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end collectible travel card visual for Tokyo, Japan, turning a crafted metro pass into a miniature living city keepsake. Subject: A hand grips an exquisitely crafted Tokyo collectible travel card; a seamlessly integrated Tokyo Tower charm becomes the hero object and opens into a tiny living world. Scene: The miniature Tokyo world includes Shibuya crossing, tiny trains, ramen stalls, scooters, lantern signs, flower stalls, and small residents, influenced by neon alleys, vending machines, shrine paper charms, sushi bar lanterns, and clean transit graphics, with a softly blurred real Tokyo backdrop for depth and place identity. Composition: Vertical 4:5 hero-object composition: hand and card in the foreground, landmark charm anchored to the card, miniature diorama spreading outward with layered cinematic depth, and realistic city atmosphere behind. Signature Elements: Preserved collectible travel card miniature city diorama source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium commercial travel-souvenir photography mixed with handcrafted miniature diorama detail, collectible ticket design, cinematic depth, and high-end editorial travel polish. Color Palette: Destination-specific colors, refined card-paper tones, miniature city accents, warm souvenir highlights, and realistic background haze. Lighting: Soft cinematic travel light with crisp card edges, charm highlights, miniature-world depth, shallow background blur, and premium keepsake sparkle. Materials: Printed card stock, embossed pass details, tiny landmark charm, paper or enamel ornamentation, miniature buildings, transit systems, cafes, vehicles, and detailed local souvenir textures. Typography: Readable Tokyo and Japan travel-card text appears naturally on the collectible; Restrictions: Keep the charm integrated into the card, not simply sitting on top;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Collectible Travel Card Miniature City Diorama Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: High-end collectible travel card visual for Lisbon, Portugal, turning a crafted retro tram ticket into a miniature living city keepsake. Subject: A hand grips an exquisitely crafted Lisbon collectible travel card; a seamlessly integrated yellow Tram 28 charm charm becomes the hero object and opens into a tiny living world. Scene: The miniature Lisbon world includes tiled facades, tiny trams, cafe tables, bridge silhouettes, scooters, flower balconies, and rivercraft, influenced by azulejo tile borders, hillside streets, river light, pastry shop signs, and blue-white ornament, with a softly blurred real Lisbon backdrop for depth and place identity. Composition: Vertical 4:5 hero-object composition: hand and card in the foreground, landmark charm anchored to the card, miniature diorama spreading outward with layered cinematic depth, and realistic city atmosphere behind. Signature Elements: Preserved collectible travel card miniature city diorama source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium commercial travel-souvenir photography mixed with handcrafted miniature diorama detail, collectible ticket design, cinematic depth, and high-end editorial travel polish. Color Palette: Destination-specific colors, refined card-paper tones, miniature city accents, warm souvenir highlights, and realistic background haze. Lighting: Soft cinematic travel light with crisp card edges, charm highlights, miniature-world depth, shallow background blur, and premium keepsake sparkle. Materials: Printed card stock, embossed pass details, tiny landmark charm, paper or enamel ornamentation, miniature buildings, transit systems, cafes, vehicles, and detailed local souvenir textures. Typography: Readable Lisbon and Portugal travel-card text appears naturally on the collectible; Restrictions: Keep the charm integrated into the card, not simply sitting on top;

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

Theme: High-end collectible travel card visual for Tokyo, Japan, turning a crafted metro pass into a miniature living city keepsake. Subject: A hand grips an exquisitely crafted Tokyo collectible travel card; a seamlessly integrated Tokyo Tower charm becomes the hero object and opens into a tiny living world. Scene: The miniature Tokyo world includes Shibuya crossing, tiny trains, ramen stalls, scooters, lantern signs, flower stalls, and small residents, influenced by neon alleys, vending machines, shrine paper charms, sushi bar lanterns, and clean transit graphics, with a softly blurred real Tokyo backdrop for depth and place identity. Composition: Vertical 4:5 hero-object composition: hand and card in the foreground, landmark charm anchored to the card, miniature diorama spreading outward with layered cinematic depth, and realistic city atmosphere behind. Signature Elements: Preserved collectible travel card miniature city diorama source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Premium commercial travel-souvenir photography mixed with handcrafted miniature diorama detail, collectible ticket design, cinematic depth, and high-end editorial travel polish. Color Palette: Destination-specific colors, refined card-paper tones, miniature city accents, warm souvenir highlights, and realistic background haze. Lighting: Soft cinematic travel light with crisp card edges, charm highlights, miniature-world depth, shallow background blur, and premium keepsake sparkle. Materials: Printed card stock, embossed pass details, tiny landmark charm, paper or enamel ornamentation, miniature buildings, transit systems, cafes, vehicles, and detailed local souvenir textures. Typography: Readable Tokyo and Japan travel-card text appears naturally on the collectible; Restrictions: Keep the charm integrated into the card, not simply sitting on top;
